hero.title: Mibin Thomas
hero.subtitle: E-commerce & Digital Growth.
hero.description: Specialized in strategic online campaigns and AI data annotation. I optimize digital pathways to boost traffic, engagement, and operational efficiency across the UAE.

about.text1: I am a result-oriented professional with a strong background in e-commerce and digital marketing. Throughout my career, I've consistently demonstrated expertise in leveraging strategic campaigns to enhance brand visibility.
about.text2: My focus is on utilizing data-driven insights to boost organic reach, creating value that directly impacts the bottom line while delivering seamless user experiences.
about.text3: Additionally, working at Amazon as an AI Data Associate handling complex Lidar annotation has granted me extreme technical rigor and precision in data-focused environments.

experience.title: E-commerce & Marketing Exec
points: Spearheading brand visibility and comprehensive e-commerce optimization across the UAE.
Formulating strategic campaigns driving vital customer engagement and lead generation.
Analyzing website analytics identifying deep opportunities for organic traffic.

experience.title: AI Data Associate
points: Specialized in 3D Lidar data processing for complex computer vision projects.
Maintained industry-leading accuracy for foundational AI model training.
Collaborated with ML engineers to streamline the support pipeline and tooling.

education.degree: Bachelor of Specific Applications in Computer Prog.
education.school: Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.description: Whether you have a strategic marketing role, a data-driven AI opportunity, or just want to connect, my inbox is always open. Let's discuss your next breakthrough.
